active.title: 🎯 Crypto Signals — Win Rate Tracker LIVE
active.notes: Win rate tracker deployed and resolving outcomes. First batch: 187 outcomes resolved (31.0% win, 25.7% loss, 43.3% neutral). Both engines writing to DB. Phase 2 (dashboard + macro filter) ready for approval.

active.title: 🔱 Jason's Crypto Signals — Frozen Signals FIXED
active.notes: Replaced dumb cooldown/dedup with state-change detection model. Fire only when: score changes ±5pts, direction flips, new token, or 30-min refresh. Continuous smart alerts flowing to Telegram (8450680760).

active.title: ⚠️ MISSING: MORNING BRIEF Cron (07:30 GMT+4)
active.notes: Cron job missing from crontab. Need to recreate for daily 07:30 AM weather + news + crypto + action items brief. Known issue: Gemini API 429 at peak hours — need Brave/Tavily fallback.

active.title: 🚀 Crypto Signals — 1000x Improvement Plan (Phase 2-4)
active.notes: Phase 1 complete (frozen signals fixed). Phase 2-4 awaiting Jason's go-ahead: (2) Signal quality: Win rate dashboard + macro correlation filter, (3) New alpha sources: OKX/Bybit funding + order book + whale tracking, (4) Architecture: Event-driven + tiered cadence.
